reason: The remediation only edits /etc/chrony.conf to add or uncomment server/pool lines, a straightforward configuration change with minimal risk of locking out access or breaking critical services. Restarting chronyd is sufficient; no reboot is required.
estimated_impact: networking affected; filesystems affected; Incorrect or unreachable NTP server could cause time drift; Network connectivity issues may prevent synchronization; Potential misconfiguration if var_multiple_time_servers is empty
